ksa_text: Present analytical findings to executive and business stakeholders, demonstrating how data and analytics initiatives address organizational challenges, and create decision support materials that inform strategic decisions.

dcwf.top_element_label: Ability to monitor network data and perform triage on triggered events.

nice.top_element_label: Knowledge of incident, event, and problem management policies and procedures

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Edge-domain Applied Analytics & BI KSA with insufficient signal strength (composite score 0.422) to justify inclusion for the GenAI CoE Leader. Without stronger framework alignment, this task KSA does not meet the inclusion threshold.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No internal inconsistency identified. Domain scope, seniority fit, and signal level are internally consistent with exclusion.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Could this edge-domain task KSA be expected in real-world GenAI CoE Leader roles, even if not core to the role definition?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Job market analysis and framework role definitions confirm Applied Analytics & BI is not a standard competency expectation for GenAI CoE Leader. Edge-case exclusion is consistent with external evidence.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Upheld: external evidence does not support including this edge-domain KSA in the GenAI CoE Leader competency profile. Exclusion maintained.

decision_rationale: Insufficient signal (score 0.422) and edge-domain placement (Applied Analytics & BI) do not meet inclusion threshold for the GenAI CoE Leader. All passes support exclusion.
